title: QA Analyst
description: Snowflake is seeking a QA Analyst to ensure quality across our cloud data platform used by thousands of enterprises. You'll work hybrid in Austin, testing features and systems that power data analytics for the world's largest organizations.
responsibilities: Design and execute test cases for Snowflake cloud platform features
Identify, document, and report bugs and quality issues
Perform manual and automated testing across multiple browsers and environments
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on quality improvements
Maintain test documentation and test case repositories
Participate in QA process improvements and best practices

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Test automation tools (Selenium, TestNG, or similar)
Bug tracking and issue management tools
Strong attention to detail and documentation skills
certifications: ISTQB (International Software Testing Qualifications Board) certification preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
